channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Stuck on a sketchy site? Google is finally putting a stop to it
item.description: Google's finally punishing sites that trap you with fake back buttons, so your browsing's about to get way less annoying.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google Search homepage
media:content.media:text: Google Search homepage
media:content.media:title: Google Search homepage

item.title: Google I/O 2026 sessions list teases major Android 17 highlights, AI, and Chrome
item.description: Google ramped up its I/O 2026 teaser engine by posting its official sessions list, detailing upcoming events for Android 17, Chrome, and AI.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google I/O 2025 ballons
media:content.media:text: Google I/O 2025 ballons
media:content.media:title: Google I/O 2025 ballons

item.title: Another round of Google Home updates makes Gemini a better DJ and task manager
item.description: Google prepared another smart home update for users that improves the Gemini's media capabilities, as well as task completion.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Home
media:content.media:text: Google Home
media:content.media:title: Google Home

item.title: Metro by T-Mobile is slashing 50% off its unlimited plan — score six months for only $20 per month!
item.description: For a limited time, Metro by T-Mobile will give you six months of its Unlimited 5G Data plan for a single payment of $120.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Metro by T-Mobile
media:content.media:text: Metro by T-Mobile
media:content.media:title: Metro by T-Mobile

item.title: Tired of repeating AI prompts? Chrome’s new feature handles it for you
item.description: Chrome’s new Skills turn repetitive AI prompts into one-click tools, making Gemini way more useful.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google Chrome logo on a phone screen
media:content.media:text: Google Chrome logo on a phone screen
media:content.media:title: Google Chrome logo on a phone screen

item.title: This is not a test: T-Mobile will already give you the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro for FREE with new deal
item.description: This eye-friendly smartphone has already gone viral, and now you can get your own for FREE by adding a line at T-Mobile.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro on display at MWC 2026.
media:content.media:text: The TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro on display at MWC 2026.
media:content.media:title: The TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro on display at MWC 2026.

item.title: Bought a new Google Pixel 10a? Here are the first 5 things you should do with it
item.description: The Google Pixel 10a might seem like a minor upgrade on the surface, but these settings and features help you maximize the phone's potential.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.
media:content.media:text: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.
media:content.media:title: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.

item.title: These Fallout glasses banish blue light — and they look pretty cool
item.description: I used Gunnar's Vault 33 glasses, and they make a genuine difference while gaming.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Gunnar Vault 33 glasses
media:content.media:text: Gunnar Vault 33 glasses
media:content.media:title: Gunnar Vault 33 glasses

item.title: Leaked 'Your Day' feature for Gemini looks like a proactive, personal addition
item.description: Gemini could get more personal and "proactive," as a report claimed Google is working on a feature called "Your Day."
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Gemini on Android at MWC 2024
media:content.media:text: Google Gemini on Android at MWC 2024
media:content.media:title: Google Gemini on Android at MWC 2024

item.title: These 5 features help me get the best sound out of the Nothing Ear 3
item.description: The Nothing Ear 3 have a bass-heavy sound signature out of the box, but you can make it your own and improve performance by using these 5 features.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Nothing Ear 3 in a white and silver aluminum colorway.
media:content.media:text: The Nothing Ear 3 in a white and silver aluminum colorway.
media:content.media:title: The Nothing Ear 3 in a white and silver aluminum colorway.

item.title: Three reasons why Thieaudio's Monarch MKIV are the ideal endgame IEMs
item.description: I used Thieaudio's Monarch MKIV, and with a custom tuning mode and ten drivers in each shell, there's no doubt that these IEMs are endgame territory.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Thieaudio Monarch MKIV review
media:content.media:text: Thieaudio Monarch MKIV review
media:content.media:title: Thieaudio Monarch MKIV review

item.title: The wait is over: NVIDIA GeForce Now is launching in India on April 16
item.description: NVIDIA GeForce Now is finally launching in India on April 16. While the cloud gaming platform will be initially in beta, it will have the same feature-set as other regions.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: NVIDIA GeForce Now testing in India
media:content.media:text: NVIDIA GeForce Now testing in India
media:content.media:title: NVIDIA GeForce Now testing in India

item.title: Samsung Galaxy A57 vs. Galaxy A37: Sibling rivalry
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy A57 and Galaxy A37 are both new launches, set $100 apart. If you're shopping for a new mid-range Android phone, here's all you need to know before making a decision.
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: Galaxy A57 and A37 in black, pink, and silver

media:content.media:title: Galaxy A57 and A37 in black, pink, and silver

item.title: I finally drop-proofed my phone, and if you're like me, you should too
item.description: Clumsiest people on the planet, please gather. If you drop your phone five times a day like me, I have found the ultimate drop-proof phone hack.

item.title: Google Meet lands on Android Auto, but there’s a catch
item.description: Google Meet is rolling out on Android Auto with audio-only calls and basic controls, but it feels limited and rushed, especially with missing work features.

item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Android Auto launcher

item.title: Galaxy Watches are running out of battery way too fast after last month's patch
item.description: Galaxy Watch users are experiencing severe battery drain issues after Samsung's latest patch, and the troublemaker might surprise you.

item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: Mint Mobile is now carving up to $900 OFF the Galaxy S26 — here is why it's one of the best Samsung deals on the web today
item.description: Mint Mobile just upgraded its best Galaxy S26 deal to include up to $400 of trade-in credit, in addition to a straight discount on the phone and 50% off a year of wireless.

item.title: Netflix is overpriced — these are the 3 streaming services I recommend instead
